heading: Delete an Alert
body:
> **Warning:** Don't delete the [Maintenance Window Alerts](maintenance-window-alerts)
> that are created when you configure a maintenance window.
>
> If you delete a maintenance window alert, disable and then
> re-enable your [maintenance](atlas-modify-project-settings) to re-create the alerts.

- On the row for a specific alert, click 
  then Delete.

  The Delete option is disabled if you don't have
  one of the following roles:

  - [Project Owner](<Project Owner>)

  - [Organization Owner](<Organization Owner>)

- Click Confirm in the Confirm Delete modal
  or click Cancel to leave the alert as configured.
